rationale: The only direct evidence is a DOI-level match (reference_index 14) without in-text citation context, so the citation’s role cannot be confirmed from metadata alone. Still, the cited study’s focus on cross-channel effects of traditional/display/paid search on online and offline sales in a retail setting overlaps with the citing paper’s multichannel retail advertising framework (including paid search and online/in-store sales measures). This makes the pair not safely droppable, but the current evidence is too thin to clearly classify as a definite keep.
